pages:
FleetLink Logistics Network
Operating Review | Digital Freight & Last-Mile Marketplace
Period: Q4 2024
FleetLink operates a digital freight and last-mile logistics marketplace connecting shippers with a distributed network of carriers.
Revenue is primarily transaction-based with additional fees from SaaS tools provided to larger accounts.
Network & Volume Metrics
Metric Q4 2024
Completed Shipments 1.07M
Active Shippers 3,180
Active Carriers 7,210
On-Time Delivery Rate 94.6%
Average Take Rate 10.8%
Financial Summary
Metric Q4 2024
Platform Revenue (recognized) 9.0M
Gross Margin 51%
Contribution Margin / Shipment $2.10
Marketing Spend as % of Revenue 18%
Support Tickets / 1,000 Shipments 15.8
Total Headcount 196
Platform Revenue of 9.0M in Q4 2024 was supported by growth in completed shipments quarter-over-quarter. Gross Margin of
51% reflects ongoing optimisation of carrier pricing incentives. Headcount of 196 at quarter-end was primarily in product and
engineering; commercial hiring remained selective.
(1) On-Time Delivery Rate is carrier-reported with a 48-hour grace window per service agreement.
(2) Contribution Margin per Shipment is post-carrier-cost, pre-overhead allocation.
(3) Average Take Rate is computed on recognized GMV net of disputed transactions.
(4) Non-cash D&A;: 0.9M. No changes to credit facilities in the quarter.

metrics.source_quote: Platform Revenue of 9.0M in Q4 2024 was supported by growth in completed shipments quarter-over-quarter.
Gross Margin of 51% reflects ongoing optimisation of carrier pricing incentives.
Headcount of 196 at quarter-end was primarily in product and engineering; commercial hiring remained selective.
Average Take Rate is computed on recognized GMV net of disputed transactions.
